message:
feat(wa-core): add interactive tutorial engine (wa learn)

New module: crates/wa-core/src/learn.rs

Provides a guided onboarding system with:
- State machine for tracking progress through tutorial tracks
- Persistent progress storage in ~/.config/wa/learn.json
- Track/exercise hierarchy (basics, events, workflows)
- Achievement system for gamification
- Time tracking for engagement metrics

Core types:
- TutorialEngine: main state machine with load/save
- TutorialState: serializable progress data
- TutorialEvent: state transition triggers
- TutorialStatus: summary view for display
- Exercise/Track: content definitions
- Achievement: unlockable rewards

Events supported:
- StartTrack: begin or resume a track
- CompleteExercise: mark exercise done
- SkipExercise: mark as seen but incomplete
- UnlockAchievement: grant reward
- Reset: clear all progress
- Heartbeat: update activity timestamp

Cargo.toml: add serde feature to chrono for DateTime serialization
lib.rs: export learn module

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@ serde_yaml.workspace = true
 
 # Directory paths
 dirs = "6.0.0"
-chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock"] }
+chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock", "serde"] }
 
 # File locking
 fs2.workspace = true
